sidebar.deleteConfirmMessage: Delete this session? It will be archived for 30 days.

settings.title: Settings

toolApprovals.description: Tools marked "Always allow" run without an approval prompt in every session on this instance. Session-only grants ("Always allow this session") are not listed here.
toolApprovals.unavailableDescription: These tools have an "always allow" preset but are not offered by any reachable server right now.
toolApprovals.empty: No tools discovered. Check your instance connection.
toolApprovals.loadError: Could not load the tool catalog: {error}

ai.description: Configure the AI backend for Cowork and Workflow modes.
ai.testNotAvailable: Test not available in browser mode

settings.generalDescription: Manage your app preferences and display settings.
settings.instanceDescription: Manage connection settings for this n8n instance.
settings.disconnectDescription: This will revoke your access tokens and remove this instance from n8n-desk. You can reconnect at any time.

connection.title: Connection
connection.description: How n8n-desk is connected to this instance.
connection.accountHint: Used for Chat — your n8n user session.
connection.mcpHint: Used for building workflows and executing them via MCP (Cowork & Workflow mode).
connection.statusUnauthorized: Authorization expired — reconnect to sign in again

mcpServer.title: Custom MCP server
mcpServer.description: By default, this instance uses n8n's built-in MCP server. Override with a custom URL if you host your own.
mcpServer.urlHelp: The URL must support OAuth 2.0 discovery at /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server.
mcpServer.resetToDefault: Reset to default n8n MCP server
mcpServer.changeConfirmTitle: Sign out of current MCP server?
mcpServer.changeConfirmMessage: Changing the URL will sign you out of the current MCP server. You'll need to sign in again.
mcpServer.backgroundValidationFailed: MCP server unreachable — agent will fail until you sign in again.

onboarding.urlHelp: Enter the URL of your n8n instance to get started.
onboarding.authorizeHelp: This lets n8n-desk search, create, and manage workflows on your behalf.
onboarding.signInHint: A browser window will open for you to sign in.
onboarding.credentialsHelp: Sign in with your n8n credentials. Your credentials are sent directly to your n8n instance — never stored.
onboarding.connectedFullAccess: Chat, build, and automate with your n8n workflows.
onboarding.mcpUrlHelp: The URL must support OAuth 2.0 discovery. Leave the toggle off to use the default n8n MCP server.
onboarding.stepMcpAuthTitle: Sign in to the custom MCP server
onboarding.mcpAuthHelp: This custom MCP server has its own OAuth flow. A browser window will open for you to authorize.

errors.unreachable: Can't reach this URL. Check the address and try again.
errors.notN8n: This doesn't appear to be an n8n instance.
errors.authTimeout: Authorization timed out. Please try again.
errors.credentialsFailed: Sign-in failed. Check your credentials and try again.
errors.mcpDiscoveryFailed: This URL doesn't appear to be an OAuth-compatible MCP server.
errors.mcpAuthFailed: MCP server authorization failed. Please try again.

reLogin.title: Session expired
reLogin.description: Your session with this instance has expired. Sign in again to continue.
reLogin.signInDescription: Sign in with your n8n account to use Chat mode on this instance.
reLogin.error: Sign-in failed. Check your credentials and try again.
reLogin.privacyNote: n8n-desk doesn't store your password. Your credentials are sent directly to your n8n instance to obtain a session token.

messages.errorTimeout: Request timed out. Please try again.

connection.offline: You're offline. Reconnect to continue chatting.

emptyState.noConfig: Configure an AI backend in Settings to get started.

csvInvoices.label: Process CSV invoices
csvInvoices.prompt: Read all CSV files in the current folder, extract invoice totals, and create a summary spreadsheet

syncServices.label: Sync data between services
syncServices.prompt: Fetch new leads from the CRM and sync them to our mailing list using an existing workflow

weeklyReport.label: Generate a weekly report
weeklyReport.prompt: Collect metrics from the last 7 days and compile a formatted status report

cleanDuplicates.label: Clean up duplicates
cleanDuplicates.prompt: Scan the data folder for duplicate entries across JSON files and consolidate them

approval.title: Approval Required
approval.executePrompt: The agent wants to execute workflow "{name}".

approval.updatePrompt: The agent wants to update workflow "{name}".

emptyState.title: Workflow Mode
emptyState.description: Describe what you want to automate and the AI agent will build n8n workflows for you.
emptyState.noConfig: Configure an AI backend in Settings to get started.

emailDigest.label: Email digest workflow
emailDigest.prompt: Create a workflow that checks Gmail every morning, summarizes new emails with AI, and sends a digest to Slack

leadEnrichment.label: Lead enrichment pipeline
leadEnrichment.prompt: Build a workflow that triggers on new CRM contacts, enriches them with company data, and updates the record

scheduledBackup.label: Scheduled data backup
scheduledBackup.prompt: Create a workflow that runs daily to export data from Postgres, compress it, and upload to S3

webhookNotification.label: Webhook to notification
webhookNotification.prompt: Build a workflow with a webhook trigger that receives form submissions and sends a formatted notification to Teams

input.placeholder: Describe a workflow to create or modify...

settings.title: Plugins & Skills
settings.description: Manage plugins, MCP servers, marketplaces, and skills.
settings.pluginsDescription: Install and manage plugins from marketplaces to extend the agent with additional tools.

connectors.description: Manage MCP server connections. The built-in n8n MCP is always active.

installed.builtInDescription: 13 workflow tools via your connected n8n instance. Always active.
installed.pluginsEmpty: No plugins installed yet. Browse the marketplace to find plugins.

discover.title: Discover Plugins
discover.description: Browse available plugins from registered marketplaces.
discover.noMarketplaces: No marketplaces registered. Add a marketplace first.

marketplaces.title: Marketplaces
marketplaces.description: Manage plugin marketplaces. Plugins are discovered from these sources.
marketplaces.addFailed: Failed to add marketplace. Please try again.

skills.builtInDescription: Skills optimized for n8n-desk. Updated automatically with the app.

skills.settingsDescription: Manage built-in and custom skills that guide the AI agent's behavior.
skills.description: Create your own skills for the AI agent.
skills.empty: No custom skills yet. Create one to get started.
skills.deleteConfirm: Delete skill "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

addServer.title: Add MCP Server
addServer.name: Name
addServer.urlInvalid: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL
addServer.headersHint: Add authentication or custom headers. Values are stored securely in the OS keychain.
addServer.headerValueKept: Stored securely — leave blank to keep
addServer.oauthClientIdHint: Optional. Required if the server doesn't support dynamic registration.
addServer.oauthClientSecretHint: Optional. Some servers require a client secret.
addServer.oauthRedirectUriHint: Use this as the redirect/callback URL when registering your OAuth app.
addServer.oauthHint: Click Connect to authorize via OAuth 2.0. A browser window will open.
addServer.oauthNeedsClientId: This server doesn't support auto-registration. Enter your Client ID above and try again.
addServer.requireApprovalHint: Ask for confirmation before executing tools from this server
addServer.testFailed: Connection failed. Check the URL and try again.
addServer.saveFailed: Failed to save server. Please try again.

installConfirm.title: Install Plugin
installConfirm.description: Review the details below before installing "{name}".
installConfirm.toolCountUnknown: Tool count unavailable (auth may be required)
installConfirm.securityInfo: Plugins connect to remote HTTP servers only. No code runs locally.
installConfirm.enterHeaderValues: Enter values for required auth headers. Values are stored securely in the OS keychain.
installConfirm.previewFailed: Failed to load plugin details. Please try again.

skill.builtInDisabledWarning: This skill is optimized for n8n-desk. If disabled, consider adding alternative n8n-related skills for best results.

skillsPopover.title: Active Skills
skillsPopover.hint: Toggle skills on/off for this session. Disabled skills won't be used by the agent.

popover.empty: No plugins or servers configured. Add them in Settings.

skillEditor.name: Name

skillEditor.instructionsPlaceholder: Write the skill instructions in markdown...
skillEditor.instructionsHint: The markdown body of the SKILL.md file. This is what the agent sees when the skill is invoked.
skillEditor.disableModelInvocationHint: Prevent the model from automatically invoking this skill
skillEditor.userInvocableHint: Allow manual invocation via slash command
skillEditor.allowedToolsHint: Comma-separated list of tools this skill can use.
skillEditor.saveFailed: Failed to save skill. Please try again.
